title: Harris 102012009 Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Roller Set 9in Includes 1 x 9" Frame, 4 x 9" Medium Pile Roller Sleeves & Tray 9"
features: Achieve a smooth finish with reduced splatter when painting rooms in your home.
Flexibility to swap between paint colors or continue using one sleeve while cleaning the others with the 4 included roller sleeves.
Soft comfortable grip frame and tray for easy use and cleaning.
Can be used with a Harris Extension Pole for added reach and efficiency when working on larger areas.
Includes: 1 x 9" Frame, 4 x 9" Medium Pile Roller Sleeves & 9" Tray.
description: From the manufacturer Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Medium Pile Paint Roller Set | 9" Harris Seriously Good 9 inch Roller Set - the ultimate solution for achieving an even and seriously good finish on your walls and ceilings. Our set includes 4 x medium pile roller sleeves that have been specially developed to provide a smooth finish with reduced splatter, making it ideal for use on semi-smooth surfaces on walls & ceilings. And with 4 sleeves included, you'll have the flexibility to swap between paint colours or continue using one sleeve while cleaning the others. Achieve a smooth finish with reduced splatter when painting rooms in your home Flexibility to swap between paint colors or continue using one sleeve while cleaning the others with the 4 included roller sleeves Soft comfortable grip frame and tray for easy use Can be used with a Harris Extension Pole for added reach and efficiency when working on larger areas (sold seperately) Harris Seriously Good Paint Roller Set | 9" Four Medium Pile Sleeves, Comfort Grip Frame & Tray | Kit for Interior Walls & Ceilings | Reduced Mess & Easy-To Clean This roller set contains: 1 x 9" Harris Paint Roller Frame 4 x 9" Harris Medium Pile Paint Roller Sleeves 1 x 9" Harris Paint Roller Tray Achieve seriously good results... Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Roller Set A roller set for achieving a seriously good finish on walls & ceilings. Advanced Roller Fabric Roller sleeves use anti spatter fabric so paint goes on the wall, not your floor. All you need in one set This roller set contains: 1 x 9" Harris Roller Frame, 4 x 9" Medium Pile Roller Sleeves & 9" Roller Tray For use on Walls & Ceilings Specialised for use with emulsion paints when painting Walls & Ceilings. The Harris Seriously Good 9 inch Roller Set is a complete solution for achieving a smooth and even finish on walls and ceilings. The set includes 4 medium pile roller sleeves that are specially designed to reduce mess and provide a seriously good results when used with emulsion paint. Q: What makes the Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Roller Set stand out from the rest? A: The Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Roller Set is specifically designed to provide a smooth finish with reduced splatter, making it perfect for use on smooth &semi-smooth surfaces. The set includes 4 x medium pile roller sleeves, a soft comfortable grip frame, and a tray for easy use and cleaning. Q: How many roller sleeves are included in the set? A: The set includes 4 roller sleeves, giving you the flexibility to swap between paint colors or continue using one sleeve while cleaning the others. Q: What are the benefits of the medium pile roller sleeves? A: The medium pile roller sleeves are ideal for use on semi-smooth surfaces such as older plastered walls and walls with spots of repair damage. It provide a seriously good finish with reduced splatter for less mess Q: What type of paint can be used with this roller set? A: This roller set is designed for use with emulsion paints, making it perfect for interior walls and ceilings. Q: Can this roller set be used with an extension pole? A: Yes, it can be used with a Harris Extension Pole (sold separately) for added reach and efficiency when working on larger areas. Q: How easy is it to clean the roller sleeves after use? A: The roller sleeves can be easily cleaned with warm water after use, allowing to dry naturally, standing up.
